title: Tencent Launches New Generation AI Creative Agent Miora, Design Beginners Can Also Complete Full Visual Solutions in One Click
excerpt: Tencent has recently announced that its new AI creative agent, Miora, is now fully launched. To allow more users to experience the convenience of intelligent cr
content_html:
Tencent has recently announced that its new AI creative agent, Miora, is now fully launched. To allow more users to experience the convenience of intelligent creation, the official also offers free 1000 points to all new registered users.

This agent focuses on the core features of "having memory, understanding, and collaboration." Users just need to state their final goal in the chat box, and Miora will break down complex tasks and mobilize multiple agents to collaboratively complete design needs.

Collaboration of Multiple Experts Covering Diverse Creative Scenarios

In the specific creative process, Miora can actively communicate and confirm image parameters and visual styles. Whether it's basic poster design or subsequent video script writing and video generation, it can quickly provide professional results.

In addition, the platform includes eight official skills, such as brand visual case. The system can assign tasks including flat images, dynamic videos, 3D modeling, and UI interfaces to corresponding field experts, ensuring a highly consistent overall design style.

Easy to Use, Helping Various Industries Create Efficiently

Even without any professional design background, users can independently complete a high-quality IP design case in a short time. This efficient intelligent creation model greatly reduces the time cost required by traditional design processes.

Currently, this tool covers various scenarios such as design beginners, independent developers, brand designers, and marketing video professionals. With simple demand instructions, everyone can easily have a personalized creative partner at their fingertips.

content_html_zh:
近日，腾讯宣布全新AI创意代理Miora现已全面上线。 为了让更多用户体验智能创作的便捷，官方还向所有新注册用户免费赠送1000积分。

该智能体专注于“有记忆、有理解、有协作”的核心特征。 用户只需在聊天框中说出自己的最终目标，Miora 就会分解复杂的任务，调动多个智能体协同完成设计需求。

多位专家协作，覆盖多样创意场景

在具体的创作过程中，Miora可以主动沟通和确认图像参数和视觉风格。 无论是基本的海报设计，还是后续的视频脚本编写和视频生成，都能快速提供专业的结果。

此外，平台还包含品牌视觉案例等八项官方技能。 系统可以将平面图像、动态视频、3D建模、UI界面等任务分配给相应的领域专家，保证整体设计风格高度一致。

简单易用，助力各行业高效创造

即使没有任何专业设计背景，用户也可以在短时间内独立完成一个高质量的IP设计案例。 这种高效的智能创作模式大大降低了传统设计流程所需的时间成本。

目前该工具涵盖了设计初学者、独立开发者、品牌设计师、营销视频专业人士等多种场景。 通过简单的需求指令，每个人都可以轻松拥有触手可及的个性化创意伙伴。
